summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WebCairn showcase website. All core functionality working correctly with only minor mobile responsive menu issue found.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile hamburger menu toggle not visible on mobile viewport (390px width) despite having md:hidden class

passed_tests: Page loads successfully with all sections (Hero, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact, Footer)
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (Services, Portfolio, About, Contact)
Theme toggle switches between light and dark mode correctly
Language toggle switches between English and French content
All 4 service cards render properly in bento grid layout
All 5 portfolio project cards render with images loading successfully
About section displays all 3 stats (47+ Projects, 100% Satisfaction, < 1s Load Time)
Contact form fields are interactive (name, email, message inputs work)
Submit button shows toast notification correctly
Logo and WebCairn branding display correctly
Footer displays with proper copyright information
Hero CTA button scrolls to contact section
Responsive design works on tablet (768px) and desktop (1920px)
Images load successfully across all sections
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile navigation responsiveness - the hamburger menu toggle should be visible on mobile viewports but currently has CSS hiding it even at 390px width
